title: Communication Preferences and Consent Record
disclaimer: Technical communication preference record — not a legal determination.
warningBanner: Marketing consent is separate from appointment, clinical follow-up, security, and mandatory service communications. Record the patient's statement and the notice version used accurately.

help.unknownNotConsent: "Unknown" is not consent — it means no explicit recorded preference exists.
help.deniedVsWithdrawn: "Denied" and "Withdrawn" are different historical states: withdrawn means a previously recorded authorization was later withdrawn.
help.notRequiredMeaning: "Not Required" is a technical policy exception (e.g. transactional/legal notice) — not a general marketing authorization.

conflict.modalNote: A stale legacy restrictive signal (e.g. SMS opt-out) disagrees with an explicit central "granted" record for this cell. Sending is blocked. Choosing "Deny" or "Withdraw" does NOT resolve this conflict — it only accepts the restrictive legacy signal, bringing the central record into agreement with it. If you believe the legacy signal itself is stale, there is currently no supported way to correct it — this should be logged as a separate follow-up.

legacySignals.title: Legacy Signal
legacySignals.disclaimer: These are legacy (pre-migration) fields and do NOT reflect the current consent status. The central preference matrix above is the current, authoritative source.

export.explanation: Export downloads the current preference state and full history for this patient as JSON. Secret/internal-only fields (e.g. raw IP/UA hashes) are never included.

confirm.grantBody: You are confirming that the patient gave explicit consent for this channel and purpose. Please record the evidence type and the notice version used accurately.
confirm.denyBody: This channel and purpose will be marked so that sending is denied.
confirm.withdrawBody: Any previously granted consent will be withdrawn and sending will be blocked from this point forward.
confirm.resetBody: This resets the current decision only; history is never deleted — a new 'unknown' state is simply recorded.

fields.noticeVersionRequiredHint: Required for a grant recorded from this source.
fields.notesPlaceholder: Brief note on the patient's statement (optional)
fields.sourceDescriptionRequiredHint: A brief description of what was said/shown is required for a staff-recorded grant.

errors.genericSave: Could not save this change. Please try again.
errors.scope_denied: You do not have access to this patient.
errors.evidence_required: An evidence type is required for this action.
errors.unsafe_note: The note was rejected because it contains disallowed content.
errors.concurrent_update: This record was updated concurrently. Please try again.
